rows.name: Telstra
rows.uploadInstructions: Upload Telstra Blitz report (XLSX) or itemised invoice (PDF).

rows.name: AAPT
rows.uploadInstructions: Upload the AAPT itemised invoice PDF. The system will extract all service lines and auto-apply any previously confirmed customer mappings.
rows.notes: AAPT is a TPG Telecom brand providing business internet (FAST Fibre, NBN-EE, IP-Line) services.

rows.name: SasBoss
rows.uploadInstructions: Upload the Access4 invoice PDF or SasBoss Dispatch Charges XLSX. Enterprise names are matched to customers using fuzzy logic. Previous matches are auto-applied.
rows.notes: Access4 Pty Ltd (ABN 66 609 946 796) - UCaaS platform provider. SmileIT is Diamond tier reseller.

rows.name: Vocus
rows.uploadInstructions: Upload Vocus TIAB monthly reports (CSV or XLSX). Standard Mobile SIMs, Fixed Line, and Broadband services supported.
rows.notes: Vocus wholesale provider. Standard Mobile SIMs imported from CSV. Fixed/broadband invoice import pending.
